D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Reference

Fabry-Perot Etalon & Finesse

raise the mirror reflectance and watch broad fringes sharpen into laser-like spikes

Multiple reflections between two mirrors transmit only at resonant phases. Higher mirror reflectance means more round trips and a sharper, taller transmission peak.

Raise mirror reflectance R to sharpen the Airy peaks. Cavity spacing d sets the free spectral range; the gold readout gives the finesse and FWHM. The curve plots transmission across three orders.
